title: Skyblock Essentials
description: A performance-optimized Hypixel SkyBlock modpack designed for smoother gameplay, dungeon optimality, and smarter economy tracking. Includes essential SkyBlock QOL mods, custom HUD overlays, profit calculators, slayer/dungeon utilities, and FPS-boost tweak
body: A performance-optimized Hypixel SkyBlock modpack designed for smoother gameplay, better dungeon runs, and smarter economy tracking. Includes essential SkyBlock QOL mods, custom HUD overlays, profit calculators, slayer/dungeon utilities, and FPS-boost tweaks
